title: Teamsterz Ice Cream Van - Assorted

description: Product Description Teamsterz Ice Cream Van - Assorted. We have carefully selected our products that are quality standard of great value. With us you are always in good hands. Directions 1. Remove the toy from its packaging. 2. Insert 3 LR44 alkaline batteries into the battery compartment. 3. Close the battery compartment. 4. Pull the toy back to activate the lights and sounds. 5. Push the toy forward to make it move and hear the realistic ice cream van sounds.
